title: Fan Control Structure Description - Cooling System

blocks.text: Fan Control Structure Description - Cooling System

Cooling performance has been improved by reviewing the cooling water circulation route. This is a water-cooled pressurized circulation system with the thermostat located on the water inlet side, bottom bypass type.

Coolant temperature is detected by the radiator water temperature sensor. The PGM FI-ECU determines the optimal fan drive based on signals from various sensors and the radiator water temperature sensor, and switches LOW/HIGH fan rotation speed. By controlling the drive according to the situation, the cooling water temperature is efficiently maintained and fan noise is reduced.
